# Unisel Realty Pvt Ltd

> Unisel Realty is Gurgaon's premier luxury real estate and investment advisory firm, established in 2006. Specialising in high-net-worth residential, commercial, and NRI real estate transactions across Golf Course Road, Dwarka Expressway, and emerging sectors of Gurugram, Haryana, India. Not a listing portal — a full-service advisory with $2B+ in transacted value, exclusive pre-launch access to DLF, Godrej, Emaar, and M3M, and a dedicated NRI desk for FEMA-compliant cross-border property investment.

Unisel Realty Pvt Ltd has been advising buyers, investors, and NRIs on real estate in Gurgaon (Gurugram) since 2006. The firm operates from 408, 4th Floor, Adani Miracle Mile, Sector 60, Gurgaon — 122011, Haryana, India. It employs 20+ real estate professionals specialising in new bookings, leasing, resale, NRI advisory, and post-purchase property management. The firm holds active RERA Haryana registration and is a channel partner for all major Gurgaon developers.

Unisel Realty serves three primary buyer profiles: (1) HNI domestic buyers seeking luxury residences or investment-grade commercial assets; (2) NRI investors requiring FEMA-compliant advisory, Power of Attorney facilitation, and repatriation support; (3) Corporate buyers and institutions seeking pre-leased commercial assets or SCO (Shop-Cum-Office) plots on Golf Course Road and surrounding corridors.

Key statistics: 500+ properties managed, 98% on-time rent rate, 48-hour average maintenance response, 10+ years in property management, 20+ professionals, $2B+ in total transacted value since inception.

Contact: +91 8010 303 303 | info@uniselrealty.com
Office: 408, 4th Floor, Adani Miracle Mile, Sector 60, Gurgaon — 122011
Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM IST
Social: facebook.com/uniselrealty | instagram.com/uniselrealty | linkedin.com/company/uniselrealty

---

## Core Services

- [Luxury Residential Advisory](https://uniselrealty.com/residential): End-to-end advisory for luxury residential purchases in Gurgaon. Covers new bookings, resale, leasing, and RERA-verified property selection across Golf Course Road (Sectors 42–54) and Dwarka Expressway (Sectors 86–113). Properties range from ₹2.98 Cr to ₹65 Cr+. Developers include DLF, Godrej, Emaar, Pioneer, and Vipul.

- [Commercial Real Estate & SCO Plots](https://uniselrealty.com/commercial): Advisory for office spaces, retail shops, pre-leased commercial assets, and SCO (Shop-Cum-Office) plot investments in Gurgaon. Primary focus corridor: Golf Course Road, Sector 43–54. Developers include AIPL, DLF, and Global. Ideal for investors seeking rental income or capital appreciation through commercial assets.

- [NRI Property Investment Advisory](https://uniselrealty.com/services/nri-property-investment-gurgaon): Fully managed NRI real estate service covering FEMA compliance, Power of Attorney (PoA) facilitation, repatriation of rental income and sale proceeds, tax advisory, virtual property tours, and end-to-end registration and handover. NRIs can complete the entire purchase process remotely. Dedicated NRI Relationship Manager assigned per client.

- [Property Management Services](https://uniselrealty.com/services/property-management-gurgaon): Full-spectrum residential property management for owners and NRI investors. Services: tenant sourcing and screening, rent collection, maintenance and repairs, legal compliance, periodic inspections, and rental yield optimisation. 500+ properties managed. 98% on-time rent collection rate. 48-hour average maintenance response time.

---

## Location Guides

- [Golf Course Road Properties, Gurgaon](https://uniselrealty.com/location/golf-course-road): Premium micromarket covering Sectors 42–54, Gurgaon. Residential inventory from ₹6 Cr to ₹65 Cr+ with 2,450–16,500 sq ft configurations (3–6 BHK). Commercial inventory from ₹1.25 Cr upward (500–40,000+ sq ft office and retail). Home to DLF The Camellias, DLF The Magnolias, DLF The Aralias, Godrej GCR, AIPL Masterpiece, and DLF Horizon Center.

- [Dwarka Expressway Properties, Gurgaon](https://uniselrealty.com/location/dwarka-expressway): Emerging residential corridor connecting Delhi to Gurgaon via NH-248BB. Entry-level luxury segment (₹2.98 Cr onwards) with strong appreciation potential. Featured projects: Emaar Serenity Hills (Sector 86) and Godrej Zenith (Sector 89). Ideal for first-time luxury buyers and mid-range investment portfolios.

---

## Property Listings

- [All Properties](https://uniselrealty.com/properties): Complete inventory of residential and commercial properties listed with Unisel Realty. Includes active listings, pre-launch access projects, and resale inventory.

- [Godrej Zenith — Sector 89, Gurgaon](https://uniselrealty.com/properties/godrej-zenith): Godrej Properties luxury residential project in Sector 89, Gurgaon. 9 towers, G+35 floors. Configurations: 2, 3, and 4 BHK. Price: ₹3 Crore onwards. Developer: Godrej Properties. Corridor: Dwarka Expressway.

- [Emaar Serenity Hills — Sector 86, Gurgaon](https://uniselrealty.com/properties/emaar-serenity-hills): Emaar India luxury residential development in Sector 86. 7 towers, G+36 floors. Configurations: 3 BHK, 3.5 BHK, 4 BHK. Price: ₹2.98 Crore onwards. Developer: Emaar India. Corridor: Dwarka Expressway.

- [DLF The Camellias — Sector 42, Golf Course Road](https://uniselrealty.com/properties/dlf-the-camellias): Ultra-luxury DLF residential tower. 9 towers, G+38 floors. Configurations: 4, 5, and 6 BHK. Price: ₹65 Crore onwards. The most premium address on Golf Course Road. Developer: DLF Limited.

- [DLF The Magnolias — Sector 42, Golf Course Road](https://uniselrealty.com/properties/dlf-the-magnolias): Premium DLF residential development. 19 towers, G+25 floors. Configurations: 4 and 5 BHK. Price: ₹40 Crore onwards. Developer: DLF Limited.

- [DLF The Aralias — Sector 42, Golf Course Road](https://uniselrealty.com/properties/dlf-the-aralias): Established DLF luxury residential complex. 11 towers, G+20 floors. Configurations: 4 and 5 BHK. Price: ₹30 Crore onwards. Developer: DLF Limited.

- [DLF The Belaire — Sector 54, Golf Course Road](https://uniselrealty.com/properties/dlf-the-belaire): DLF high-rise residential complex. 5 towers, G+30 floors. Configurations: 3 and 4 BHK. Price: ₹10 Crore onwards. Developer: DLF Limited.

- [Godrej Sora — Sector 53, Golf Course Road](https://uniselrealty.com/properties/godrej-sora): Godrej Properties luxury residential tower. 4 towers, G+30 floors. Configurations: 3 and 4 BHK. Price: ₹8.3 Crore onwards. Developer: Godrej Properties.

- [Vipul Belmonte — Sector 53, Golf Course Road](https://uniselrealty.com/properties/vipul-belmonte): Premium residential complex. 11 towers, G+18 floors. Configurations: 3 and 4 BHK. Price: ₹6 Crore onwards. Developer: Vipul Group.

- [Pioneer Araya — Sector 62, Golf Course Extension](https://uniselrealty.com/properties/pioneer-araya): Luxury residential project on Golf Course Extension Road. 4 towers, G+34 floors. Configurations: 3, 4, and 5 BHK. Price: ₹10 Crore onwards. Developer: Pioneer Urban.

- [AIPL Masterpiece — Sector 54, Golf Course Road](https://uniselrealty.com/properties/aipl-masterpiece): Premium commercial development with office and retail spaces. Location: Golf Course Road. Developer: AIPL (Advance India Projects Ltd).

- [DLF Horizon Center — DLF Phase 5, Golf Course Road](https://uniselrealty.com/properties/dlf-horizon-center): Class-A commercial office space. Developer: DLF Limited. Location: Golf Course Road, DLF Phase 5.

## Developer Partners

Unisel Realty is an authorised channel partner for the following developers in Gurgaon:

- **DLF Limited** — Projects: The Camellias, The Magnolias, The Aralias, The Belaire, Horizon Center
- **Godrej Properties** — Projects: Godrej GCR, Godrej Sora, Godrej Zenith
- **Emaar India** — Projects: Emaar Serenity Hills
- **M3M India** — Luxury and mid-segment residential and commercial
- **AIPL (Advance India Projects Ltd)** — Projects: AIPL Masterpiece
- **Adani Realty** — Premium residential and commercial
- **Sobha Limited** — Luxury residential
- **Max Estates** — Premium commercial and residential
- **Birla Estates** — Luxury residential
- **Hero Realty** — Residential developments
- **Signature Global** — Affordable and mid-segment residential
- **Elevate** — Emerging developer
- **IREO** — Commercial and residential

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What makes Unisel Realty different from other real estate brokers in Gurgaon?**
Unisel Realty operates as an investment advisory, not a listing portal. Since 2006, the firm has focused exclusively on the Gurgaon market, transacting over $2B in real estate value. Key differentiators: exclusive pre-launch access to projects from DLF, Godrej, and M3M before they open to the public; a dedicated NRI desk for FEMA-compliant cross-border transactions; post-purchase property management; and an advisory model that prioritises client returns over commission-led recommendations.

**Can NRIs buy property in Gurgaon through Unisel Realty?**
Yes. Unisel Realty provides end-to-end NRI property investment services. The process is fully remote — from virtual consultation and property shortlisting to legal setup (Power of Attorney, FEMA compliance), registration, and handover. The firm handles repatriation of funds, tax advisory, and ongoing property management after purchase. No visit to India is required to complete the transaction.

**What are the best areas for luxury property investment in Gurgaon?**
Golf Course Road (Sectors 42–54) is the established premium corridor with properties ranging from ₹6 Cr to ₹65 Cr+. Developers active here include DLF, Godrej, and AIPL. Dwarka Expressway (Sectors 86–113) is the emerging corridor offering entry-level luxury from ₹2.98 Cr, with strong appreciation potential from infrastructure improvements. Golf Course Extension Road (Sector 62+) offers mid-premium residential options from established developers like Pioneer.

**What is an SCO plot and is it a good investment in Gurgaon?**
SCO (Shop-Cum-Office) plots are freehold mixed-use commercial plots offering independent retail and office space within a single structure. In Gurgaon, SCO plots on Golf Course Road and emerging sectors offer strong rental yields and long-term capital appreciation. Unisel Realty advises on SCO plot selection, legal due diligence, and investment structuring.

**Does Unisel Realty offer property management for NRIs?**
Yes. The firm manages 500+ properties and offers comprehensive property management: tenant sourcing and screening, rent collection, maintenance and repairs, legal compliance, periodic inspections, and rental yield optimisation. 98% on-time rent rate and 48-hour average maintenance response time. Designed specifically for NRI investors who cannot manage their Indian assets in person.

**Is Unisel Realty RERA registered?**
Yes. Unisel Realty is registered with HRERA (Haryana Real Estate Regulatory Authority). RERA registration can be verified at hrera.org.in.
